display.purpose: App name, major empty states, and first-run setup headings only.

body.purpose: Explanations, recovery copy, and state detail.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: A floating voice dock or active recovery panel.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, active, and selected state changes.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Panel reveal, recovery state, and non-blocking transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.560 0.150 35); color: oklch(1.000 0.000 0); border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font: 650 0.95rem/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.500 0.140 35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.560 0.150 35 / 28%); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary command for cancel, retry, or copy fallback.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.995 0.000 0); color: oklch(0.210 0.018 235); border: 1px solid oklch(0.860 0.012 235); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font: 650 0.95rem/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.970 0.004 230); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.560 0.150 35 / 28%); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact phase label for the voice state machine.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.970 0.004 230); color: oklch(0.210 0.018 235); border: 1px solid oklch(0.860 0.012 235); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 8px; font: 700 0.78rem/1.25 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.560 0.150 35); }

components.name: Foreground Panel
components.description: Neutral container for app shell, voice dock, or recovery content.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: oklch(0.995 0.000 0); color: oklch(0.210 0.018 235); border: 1px solid oklch(0.860 0.012 235); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgb(35 45 55 / 8%); } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0; font: 680 1.375rem/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { margin: 10px 0 0; color: oklch(0.450 0.020 235); font: 400 1rem/1.55 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: Dictation Tauri should feel like a compact desktop control surface: restrained, legible, and exact about what is happening. The interface serves an active workflow, so the design must stay calm while another application is the user's main context.
keyCharacteristics: Compact desktop density with clear hierarchy.
State-first surfaces for listening, transcribing, delivering, completion, failure, and cancellation.
Restrained color, with primary color used for current action and active state only.
Familiar product controls: buttons, chips, panels, tabs, menus, and settings patterns.
Accessible by default: visible focus, high contrast, reduced motion support, and text that fits narrow windows.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Signal Rule
rules.body: Burnt Signal may occupy no more than a small fraction of a screen. If every panel is warm, nothing is active.

rules.name: The No Purple AI Chrome Rule
rules.body: Purple, blue-purple gradients, and decorative AI glows are prohibited for core product chrome.

rules.name: The Product Scale Rule
rules.body: Do not use fluid viewport-scaled type in app surfaces. Product UI uses fixed rem steps so controls remain predictable.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation appears only when a panel must visually detach from surrounding content.

dos: Do make the current dictation state visible in text, not just color.
Do keep the main surface compact enough for desktop overlay use.
Do reserve Burnt Signal for primary action, active listening, and one selected state.
Do use standard product controls before inventing custom affordances.
Do include focus-visible treatment and reduced-motion behavior in every durable UI surface.
Do distinguish paste sent, copy fallback, and delivery observed when those states exist.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS landing-page aesthetics.
Don't use dark purple or blue gradient AI tool chrome.
Don't make the app look like an audio engineering dashboard.
Don't make chat-first assistant UI the main surface for MVP 0-3.
Don't copy Clipboard-manager UI patterns from CopyQ Tauri unless a Dictation Tauri spec explicitly needs them.
Don't imply delivery was observed when the app only sent paste or copied text.
Don't use colored side stripes, gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative blobs, oversized hero sections, or repeated marketing card grids.
